title: Hex Shaders
description: hexshaders is a color graded and optimized version of oakshaders, improving visuals with refined colors and better performance while keeping a smooth and polished experience.
body:
HexShaders is a color-graded and optimized version of OakShaders, designed to deliver improved visuals while maintaining smooth performance. It enhances the original experience with refined colors, a cleaner atmosphere, and optimization tweaks for better FPS and overall gameplay. HexShaders focuses on balancing visual quality and performance, creating a more polished shader experience without sacrificing efficiency.


Features
Customizable water with adjustable settings

Color grading controls (saturation, brightness, and contrast)

Toggleable bloom for a softer or cleaner look

Performance-focused design for smooth gameplay
